description_long: This shotgun features a compact, tactical design with a robust, angular body and a short barrel, making it suitable for close-quarters urban environments. The main body is finished in a matte olive green with black and red accents, giving it a modern, militaristic appearance. The grip is ergonomically shaped with textured grooves for secure handling, and the trigger area is protected by a squared, reinforced guard. The top of the shotgun has a ribbed rail, likely for mounting optics or accessories, and the barrel end is visibly reinforced with a tri-port muzzle. The receiver and fore-end are integrated into a single, solid unit, with visible magazine or loading ports on the side. Red highlights on the safety and action components add visual contrast and indicate interactive parts.
description: A compact, tactical shotgun with a matte olive green and black finish, featuring a ribbed top rail, ergonomic grip, and red accent details. Its short barrel and robust build are designed for urban close-quarters use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tri-port muzzle, ribbed top rail, and the reinforced, angular barrel end.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the olive green body, black grip, red safety, and side loading ports.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the ribbed rail, rear sight area, and the back of the ergonomic grip.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the black and olive green body, red action lever, and detailed grip texture.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a short, reinforced muzzle and ribbed top rail
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Squared, reinforced trigger guard with a robust, angular profile and no finger grooves
